name: Adham
tagline: Yes I do have multiple entries, I am the MODERATOR muhahahaha
quote: The map is not the territory, but a good map saves your life.
message: You're NOT in a race, nomatter how much the world tries to convince you otherwise, that's just Capitalism for you. you only live once, fear god and do what YOU will
fun_fact: Voice acted in a co-op game he also helped code. His character died in the demo.
